business_definition: Days between customer last completed order and anchor date.
usage_notes: Primary churn recency signal; higher often means higher churn risk.

business_definition: Share of completed orders placed online.
usage_notes: Use with store_order_share and preferred_channel for channel strategy.

business_definition: Binary indicator of 30-day conversion after assignment.
usage_notes: Base target for campaign response and uplift baselines.

business_definition: Revenue generated by customer in 90 days before campaign assignment.
usage_notes: Use as pre-treatment baseline in uplift analyses.

business_definition: Total weekly units sold for product-location grain.
Four-week rolling average demand for product-location.
usage_notes: Useful lagged smoothed feature for baseline forecasting models.

business_definition: Binary indicator that order item has an associated return.
usage_notes: Base supervised target for return risk modeling.

business_definition: Historical return rate for customer before current item.
usage_notes: High-signal risk feature; monitor leakage windows carefully.

business_definition: Weighted implicit feedback score from purchases, events, and reviews.
usage_notes: Use for ranking candidates in recommendation baselines.

business_definition: Rank of product by interaction score within customer history.
usage_notes: Useful for top-k recommendation evaluation and filters.
Core metric for store performance and weekly planning.

business_definition: Four-week rolling average of store revenue.
usage_notes: Supports trend analysis and anomaly detection baselines.
